metadata.description: Marketplace for Thai-language Claude Code skills · มาร์เก็ตเพลสทักษะ Claude ภาษาไทย

plugins.name: claude-thai-skills
plugins.description: 12 skills ภาษาไทยสำหรับ Claude Code — translation, social captions, resumes, government letters, PDPA, tax invoices, PromptPay, Thai national ID, BE/CE dates, Thai addresses, customer service.

plugins.name: thai-translate
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving English-Thai or Thai-English translation, localization, or rewording.

plugins.name: thai-social-caption
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving writing Thai-language social media captions, posts, or short-form copy.

plugins.name: thai-customer-service
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai customer service messaging — replies, apologies, status updates, refund/return scripts, and auto-replies on LINE OA, Facebook Page, Shopee, Lazada, Instagram DM, TikTok Shop, and similar channels.

plugins.name: thai-resume
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai-language or bilingual (TH/EN) resumes and CVs.

plugins.name: thai-festival-card
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai festival greetings, condolences, wedding cards, royal-occasion messages, or seasonal cards.

plugins.name: thai-government-form
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai government letters, official correspondence, formal petitions, authorization letters, leave requests, or ราชการ forms.

plugins.name: thai-pdpa
plugins.description: Use this skill for tasks involving Thailand's PDPA (พ.ร.บ. คุ้มครองข้อมูลส่วนบุคคล พ.ศ. 2562).

plugins.name: thai-text-processing
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai text in code — word segmentation, Unicode normalization, sorting/collation, search indexing, romanization, truncation, or database/Elasticsearch configuration for Thai.

plugins.name: thai-id-validate
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai national ID, tax ID, phone number, or PromptPay QR code validation, normalization, or generation.

plugins.name: thai-date-format
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai date formatting, Buddhist Era (พ.ศ.) ↔ Gregorian (ค.ศ.) year conversion, or Arabic ↔ Thai numeral conversion.

plugins.name: thai-address
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai postal address parsing, validation, formatting, or province/postcode lookup.

plugins.name: thai-invoice
plugins.description: Use this skill for any task involving Thai tax invoices, receipts, quotations, or withholding-tax certificates.
